nasb.text: for he removed the foreign altars and high places, tore down the sacred pillars, cut down the Asherim,

esv.text: He took away the foreign altars and the high places and broke down the pillars and cut down the Asherim

cnv.text: 他除掉外族人的祭壇和邱壇，打斷神柱，砍下亞舍拉，

ccb.text: 拆除外族神明的丘坛和神庙，打碎神柱，砍倒亚舍拉神像，
